evidence.source_title: The Ayatollah Begs to Differ — Penguin Random House
evidence.description: Hooman Majd is the nephew of Sadegh Kharrazi, former IRI ambassador to France and senior Foreign Ministry official — a family connection central to Majd's insider access to IRI political circles.

editorial_notes: Majd is nephew (nephew/uncle relationship). Using in-law as closest available family_subtype.
